en: Hi, uh, Rick Sorkin. Harry Spector, nice to meet you.
ko: 안녕하세요, 릭 소킨. 해리 스펙터입니다. 반갑습니다. 여기 앉으세요

en: You should have a seat here. Whoa, what's this?
How the hell did you know they were the police?
ko: 대체 경찰인 걸 어떻게 알았어? 초등학교 때 읽은 소설이 있어요

en: I read this novel in elementary school.
ko: 대체 경찰인 걸 어떻게 알았어? 초등학교 때 읽은 소설이 있어요

en: Cops are staking out a hotel, one of them dresses as a bellhop, the other as a man in a suit.
ko: 경찰이 호텔을 잠복하는데 하나는 벨보이, 하나는 양복 입은 남자로 변장해요. 똑같았어요

en: And it was the exact same thing. You read a novel in elementary school?
ko: 경찰이 호텔을 잠복하는데 하나는 벨보이, 하나는 양복 입은 남자로 변장해요. 똑같았어요

en: What? I like to read. And why'd you ask them what time it was?
Throw them off. I mean, what kind of drug dealer asks a cop what time it is when he's got a briefcase
ko: 그런데 왜 몇 시냐고 물었어? 수상하지 않으려고요. 마리화나 가방 든 마약상이 경찰한테 시간을 물어보겠어요?

en: full of pot, right? We should hire you.
Jesus, I'd give you the 25 grand as a signing bonus.
I'll take it. Unfortunately, we only hire from Harvard.
And you not only did not go to Harvard Law School, you haven't even gone to any law school.
What if I told you that I consume knowledge like no one you've ever met and I've actually passed the bar?
ko: 제가 누구보다 빨리 지식을 습득하고 실제로 변호사 시험에 합격했다고 하면요? 허풍이라고 하겠네요
